ns0:entry.ns0:title: CopilotKit/CopilotKit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CopilotKit/CopilotKit
Language: typescript
The Frontend Stack for Agents & Generative UI. React, Angular, Mobile, Slack, and more. Makers of the AG-UI Protocol

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
Language: typescript
Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything
Language: typescript
Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
Language: typescript
Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenCut-app/OpenCut
Language: typescript
The open-source CapCut alternative

ns0:entry.ns0:title: activeloopai/hivemind
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/activeloopai/hivemind
Language: typescript
Hivemind turns your traces into reusable skills across agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/page-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/page-agent
Language: typescript
JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: can1357/oh-my-pi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/can1357/oh-my-pi
Language: typescript
⌥ AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: colbymchenry/codegraph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/colbymchenry/codegraph
Language: typescript
Pre-indexed code knowledge graph, auto syncs on code changes, for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, OpenCode, AntiGravity, Kiro, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cypress-io/cypress
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cypress-io/cypress
Language: typescript
Fast, easy and reliable testing for anything that runs in a browser.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: every-app/open-seo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/every-app/open-seo
Language: typescript
Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firecrawl/firecrawl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl
Language: typescript
The API to search, scrape, and interact with the web at scale. 🔥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp
Language: typescript
freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iptv-org/iptv
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iptv-org/iptv
Language: typescript
Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lfnovo/open-notebook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lfnovo/open-notebook
Language: typescript
An Open Source implementation of Notebook LM with more flexibility and features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: makeplane/plane
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/makeplane/plane
Language: typescript
🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mauriceboe/TREK
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mauriceboe/TREK
Language: typescript
A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: meshery/meshery
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/meshery/meshery
Language: typescript
Meshery, the cloud native manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stablyai/orca
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stablyai/orca
Language: typescript
Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: supermemoryai/supermemory
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/supermemoryai/supermemory
Language: typescript
Memory and context engine + app that is extremely fast, scalable, and can be run fully locally. The Memory API for the AI era.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tashfeenahmed/freellmapi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tashfeenahmed/freellmapi
Language: typescript
OpenAI-compatible proxy that stacks the free tiers of 16 LLM providers (~1.7B tokens/month) behind one /v1 endpoint — plus any custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Smart routing, automatic failover, encrypted keys. Personal experimentation only.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: withastro/flue
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/withastro/flue
Language: typescript
The sandbox agent framework.
